name: MANHATTAN BRIDGE CAPITAL, INC
summary: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. is a New York-based real estate finance company and REIT that specializes in originating, servicing, and managing a portfolio of short-term, first mortgage loans (hard money loans) to real estate investors. It funds acquisition, renovation, rehabilitation, or improvement of residential and commercial properties in the New York metropolitan area (including New Jersey and Connecticut) and Florida, with loan amounts up to $4 million and interest rates typically ranging from 9% to 12.5% per annum.

products.name: Short-Term First Mortgage Loans
products.description: Hard money loans secured by first mortgage liens on residential or commercial real estate for acquisition, renovation, rehabilitation, or improvement.

products.name: Construction Financing
products.description: Loans funding construction costs up to 80% of construction costs, secured by first mortgage on real estate.

products.name: Acquisition Financing
products.description: Loans up to 75% of appraised property value for real estate acquisition, secured by first mortgage lien.
